note: Interpretation records per charter §10. Chosen readings apply to the NORMALIZED layer; the pass-2 verbatim intermediate is never altered. Sites reference transcript block indices; block content hashes in digitization/transcripts/block-hashes.json (local) anchor provenance.

records.ambiguity: Potions table prints E S P 37-40 and Delusion 38-40 — overlapping percentile ranges.
records.rationale: Operator: overlap is a typo; split is contiguous with Flying 33-36 and Healing 41-44.

records.ambiguity: Languages Spoken table prints Four 86-95 and Five 90-99 — overlapping.
records.rationale: Operator: typo. Three ends at 85 so Four stands; printed '90' on Five is a 6/0 typo for 96.

records.ambiguity: Three spellings across occurrences: Telekenesis, Telekenisis, Telekensis.
Printed worked example: '962.5 x 7 = 6,037.5' — true product is 6,737.5.
records.rationale: Operator: fix. The stated rule (7/8 proration) is unambiguous; a wrong worked example misleads consumers. Verbatim layer keeps 6,037.5.
D-6 typo normalization; internal text settles intent.

records.ambiguity: Errata: Page 28 line 9 'each' should be 'east'. Line-9 count did not obviously land on an 'each'.
candidates: record as inapplicable to this printing
records.chosen: apply: Dimension Door example reads '...12" upwards, 32" east, etc.'
records.rationale: Operator confirmed the target: the only '32" each' on the page, in the Dimension Door entry; earlier 'join anomaly' was a line-counting artifact.

records.ambiguity: Constitution +1/+2 payoff is 'Will withstand adversity' — no typed mechanic derivable.
records.rationale: Operator: the text itself delegates to the referee.

records.ambiguity: Elves elect Fighting-Man or Magic-User at the start of each adventure — race/class ontology fork.
candidates: race entry + class-choice race-feature rule (keep races/classes split)
records.rationale: Operator: approaches equivalent; (i) maximizes 5.1 taxonomy reuse per D-5 principle.
Layout: columns 2-4 follow unlabeled; mechanical reading.

records.ambiguity: City terrain column prints '---' for both Lost and Encounter rows; errata adds 'An Encounter occurs in a City on a 6.'
records.chosen: Encounter: 6 (errata); Lost: --- (cannot get lost in a city)

records.ambiguity: Die-range cells use 0 for 10 and 00 for 100 ('7-0', '9-0', '91-00').
records.rationale: Period convention; verbatim layer preserves literals.

records.ambiguity: Tabular abbreviations require expansion for typed refs.
records.chosen: single map: Myrmi's=Myrmidons, S'bucks.=Swashbucklers, Blsks.=Basilisks, Chmrs.=Chimeras, Grgyls.=Gargoyles, Lycs.=Lycanthropes, S'heros=Superheroes, H'griffs=Hippogriffs, Vmprs.=Vampires, W. Apes=White Apes, Champs.=Champions, Mntcrs.=Manticores, Heros=Heroes, Anmls.=Animals, Swim'r=Swimmer, misc. mg.=Miscellaneous Magic, Evil H. P.=Evil High Priest
records.rationale: One census artifact; re-derivation per entry invites drift.

records.ambiguity: Alignment lists: Wights listed twice; Griffons absent.
records.chosen: apply errata: delete first Wights listing (Chaos), add Griffons under Neutrality

records.ambiguity: Artifacts list mixes Scepter/Sceptre across the three crown sets.
records.rationale: D-6 typo normalization; majority spelling on the page.

records.ambiguity: Explanation heading prints 'Invisibility, 10" Radius' (inches) but the spells table prints 'Invisibility, 10' r.' (feet).
candidates: feet (table; parallel with Protection from Evil, 10' Radius)
records.rationale: Parallel construction with the Protection spell and the table reading; "/' typo class under D-6.
records.status: provisional — extraction call, flagged for operator review
